source: NIE-294/NIE-295/NIE-296 profiling baseline after fast/full split and targeted test-speed optimizations

fast.scope: Fast deterministic unit suite; excludes profiled git/worktree/process-heavy simulations.

integration.scope: Profiled git/worktree/process-heavy simulation files excluded from the fast path.

full.scope: Complete Vitest suite for Agent Review, release handoff, broad runtime changes, or CI-equivalent local proof.

tests/cli/local-multi-project-trial.test.note: Process-heavy local multi-project simulation retained outside the fast path.

tests/runtime/bootstrap.test.ts.note: Runtime bootstrap and git-backed startup simulation.

tests/cli/local-command-router.test.ts.note: Real CLI, temp git repositories, and generated worktree materialization.

tests/api/server-state.test.ts.note: Server control-plane state simulation with worktree/process-heavy cases.

tests/cli/doctor-mvp-scenario-matrix.tes.note: Real CLI scenario matrix over blocker/pass/warning worktree states.

tests/cli/workspace-before-remove.test.t.note: Workspace cleanup hook and git/worktree safety simulation.
